mapper.sql: id, room_id, bed_no, status, current_student_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into dorm_bed (room_id, bed_no, status, current_student_id, created_at, updated_at) values (#{roomId}, #{bedNo}, #{status}, #{currentStudentId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})

insert into dorm_bed (room_id, bed_no, status, current_student_id, created_at, updated_at) values
(#{bed.roomId}, #{bed.bedNo}, #{bed.status}, #{bed.currentStudentId}, #{bed.createdAt}, #{bed.updatedAt})
mapper.update: update dorm_bed set room_id = #{roomId}, bed_no = #{bedNo}, status = #{status}, current_student_id = #{currentStudentId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
update dorm_bed set status = #{status}, current_student_id = #{currentStudentId}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from dorm_bed where room_id = #{roomId}
